zh.lifeSummary: 當Osbert Thomas de Compton於1200年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾阿爾登時，他的父親Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn40歲，母親Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton41歲。他於1255年與Margaret Strathearn在英國瓦維其可爾康普頓 維亞斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1279年在英國瓦維其可爾康普頓 維尼亞斯享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Osbert Thomas de Compton于1200年出生在英国英格兰越可爾阿爾登时，他的父亲Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn40岁，母亲Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton41岁。他于1255年与Margaret Strathearn在英国瓦維其可爾康普頓 維亞斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1279年在英国瓦維其可爾康普頓 維尼亞斯享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Compton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England (but especially in the southwest) named Compton, from Old English cumb ‘short, straight valley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cumpton
meanings: English (Herefordshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Compton  .

nameMeanings.name: Osbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ōs ‘god’ + beorht ‘bright, famous’. It is not now common, but in the earlier 20th century it enjoyed a modest vogue in Britain, being borne for example by the cartoonist Osbert Lancaster ( 1908–86 ) and the writer Osbert Sitwell ( 1892–1969 ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Osbert Thomas de Compton was born in 1200, in Arden, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn, was 40 and his mother, Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton, was 41. He married Margaret Strathearn in 1255, in Compton Wynyates, Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1279, in Compton Wyniates, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Osbert Thomas de Compton est né en 1200, à Arden, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Strathearn en 1255, à Compton Wynyates, Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1279, à Compton Wyniates, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Osbert Thomas de Compton 1200 in Arden, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn 40 und seine Mutter Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton 41. Er hat 1255 in Compton Wynyates, Warwickshire, England Margaret Strathearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1279 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Compton Wyniates, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Osbert Thomas de Compton è nato il nel 1200 nel Arden, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Strathearn nel 1255, nel Compton Wynyates, Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1279, nel Compton Wyniates, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Osbert Thomas de Comptonが1200年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアルデンで生まれた時，父Lord Philip Cumton - Comynは40歳，母Lady Basilla Comyn de Comptonは41歳であった。1255年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコンプトン ウイニーアツでMargaret Strathearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1279年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコンプトン ウイニアツで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Osbert Thomas de Compton(이)가 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 아든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1255년 영국 워윅실르 콤프턴 윈이니앳스에서 Margaret Strathearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1279년 영국 워윅실르 콤프턴 윈이니앳스에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Osbert Thomas de Compton nasceu em 1200, em Arden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Strathearn em 1255, em Compton Wynyates, Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Osbert Thomas de Compton родился в 1200 г. в местности арден, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Strathearn в 1255 г. в местности комптон винятс, варвиккшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1279 г. в местности комптон винятс, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Osbert Thomas de Compton nació en 1200, en Arden, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Philip Cumton - Comyn, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lady Basilla Comyn de Compton, tenía 41 años.
